verdict: A highly engaging and rhythmically precise chart with great density progression, let down only by a slightly awkward tech transition during a hold near the climax.

issues.problem: Awkward 16th-note sequence (D then R) while holding U forces a very tight one-foot slide or uncomfortable physical stretch.
The rapid overlapping rolling holds (L -> R -> U -> D) create a sudden spike in technical difficulty compared to the rest of the chart.
